meta.professor_methodology: Bond pricing as PV of coupons plus face value
meta.description: Bond valuation principles and basic depreciation concepts

patterns.name: Bond Pricing
patterns.recognition_signal: Face value, coupon rate, yield rate, maturity given
patterns.logic: Present value of coupon annuity plus present value of face value

pitfalls.name: Semi-annual error
pitfalls.description: Forgetting to double periods and halve rates

pitfalls.name: Rate confusion
pitfalls.description: Confusing coupon rate with yield rate

professor_tips: Bond price and yield are inversely related
Coupon rate determines payment, yield determines price

confidence_checklist: I can price any bond correctly
I understand premium vs discount bonds
